description: Analyze the Muncie unsteady flow simulation results in the HDF5 file /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/Muncie.p04.hdf (or Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf) to determine velocity distributions across the river channel. Extract velocity time-series data for all cross-sections and generate a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/velocity_distribution.csv containing the columns cross_section, max_velocity, mean_velocity, and min_velocity. Identify the cross-section with the absolute highest peak velocity and record its identifier and peak velocity value in a summary text file at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/velocity_summary.txt, placing the identifier on the first line and the peak velocity value on the second.
